headerDisplay: Connect your Aranet4 CO2 sensor to HomeKit with full history support.

name.title: Platform Name
name.description: Display name for this platform instance.

name.title: Device Name
name.description: A friendly name for this sensor.

address.title: MAC Address
address.description: Bluetooth MAC address of the Aranet4 device (e.g., AA:BB:CC:DD:EE:FF). Leave blank for auto-discovery.

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to read sensor data, in seconds. Minimum 60s.

co2AlertThreshold.title: CO2 Alert Threshold (ppm)
co2AlertThreshold.description: CO2 level (ppm) at which CarbonDioxideDetected triggers.

lowBatteryThreshold.title: Low Battery Threshold (%)
lowBatteryThreshold.description: Battery percentage below which low-battery alert triggers.

enableHistory.title: Enable Eve History
enableHistory.description: Enable historical graphs in the Eve app.
